symbols: circular forms — cosmic bodies, the sphere of creation
red and blue interplay — the elemental forces of the universe
chaotic layering — the primordial chaos before or during creation
description: A densely layered abstract painting dominated by reds and blues. Circular and spherical forms emerge from a complex web of lines, drips, and geometric fragments. The overall composition is crowded and energetic, suggesting cosmic forces in motion. Red tones dominate, with blue accents throughout. The surface appears heavily textured with multiple layers of paint. Small figurative hints may be embedded in the abstraction but are largely consumed by the chaotic energy of the composition.
